title: Questions from Quarantine: Trump's Plan for Fighting COVID-19
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: This article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series, presented by the Security and Global Health Project, aims to provide expert advice and answers to public questions during the COVID-19 pandemic. It encourages audience participation by inviting questions via Twitter with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The specific episode highlighted focuses on evaluating 'Trump's Plan for Fighting COVID-19.' The broader context includes related expert analyses on topics such as mega-event safety, global supply chains, and potential migration crises, positioning the discussion within the intersection of public health, security, and global policy.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列由安全与全球健康项目推出，旨在在COVID-19大流行期间，就如何保持理智与卫生提供专家建议并回答公众疑问。文章鼓励观众通过推特使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提问来参与互动。文中特别提及的一期节目聚焦于评估“特朗普抗击COVID-19的计划”。更广泛的背景还包括相关专家对大型活动安全规划、全球供应链管理以及潜在移民危机等议题的分析，将讨论置于公共卫生、安全与全球政策的交叉领域。
